title: Save-and-reopen round trip (e2e)
purpose: A browser-level end-to-end suite over the same user story as TS-100, demonstrating that one US legitimately carries multiple suites at different test levels.

testCases.description: Typing content, clicking Save, and reloading the page reopens the note with identical content.
testCases.testPointer: test/e2e/save-reopen.spec.js::note survives a full page reload
